zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexandre Toose de Taunton於1435年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓時，他的父親Sir Edouard Tawsé de Taunton35歲，母親Lady Jane Joan Somerset34歲。他於1459年與Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年10月8日在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexandre Toose de Taunton于1435年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓时，他的父亲Sir Edouard Tawsé de Taunton35岁，母亲Lady Jane Joan Somerset34岁。他于1459年与Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年10月8日在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Toose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tooze
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Gloucestershire): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Tos(s)e (Old English Tossa, a pet form of Torhtsige, from torht ‘bright’ + sige ‘victory’).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Taunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Taunton in Somerset. The place takes its name from the river Tone (the name of which is related to the Indo-European root tā-, tə- ‘melt, flow’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Tanton
meanings: English (mainly Devon and Kent): variant of   Taunton  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexandre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexandre Toose de Taunton was born in 1435, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Edouard Tawsé de Taunton, was 35 and his mother, Lady Jane Joan Somerset, was 34. He married Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton in 1459, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 8 October 1489, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexandre Toose de Taunton est né en 1435, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edouard Tawsé de Taunton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Joan Somerset, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton en 1459, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1489, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexandre Toose de Taunton 1435 in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edouard Tawsé de Taunton 35 und seine Mutter Lady Jane Joan Somerset 34. Er hat 1459 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1489 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandre Toose de Taunton è nato il nel 1435 nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Edouard Tawsé de Taunton, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane Joan Somerset, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton nel 1459, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 ottobre 1489, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexandre Toose de Tauntonが1435年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンで生まれた時，父Sir Edouard Tawsé de Tauntonは35歳，母Lady Jane Joan Somersetは34歳であった。1459年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでLady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Tauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年10月8日に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexandre Toose de Taunton(이)가 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edouard Tawsé de Taunton(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Joan Somerset(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 10월 8일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandre Toose de Taunton nasceu em 1435, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Edouard Tawsé de Taunton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Joan Somerset, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton em 1459, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1489, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexandre Toose de Taunton родился в 1435 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Edouard Tawsé de Taunton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Joan Somerset, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton в 1459 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 8 октября 1489 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexandre Toose de Taunton nació en 1435, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Edouard Tawsé de Taunton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Joan Somerset, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton en 1459, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1489, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
